hero.title: Find your experiences
hero.lead: Choose your days on the island, build one trip from many excursions, and pay once.

list.title: Curated experiences
list.lead: Coastal excursions book instantly. Safaris and tailor-made routes are arranged on request.
list.empty: No experiences match your search yet — try a different word.

section.title: Choose your departure
section.lead: Pick a date, time and guests — add it to one trip with your other experiences and pay once at checkout.
section.point_cart: Combine several experiences in one order
section.point_codes: A separate booking code for every trip

panel.pick_date_hint: Select a date above to see available departures.
panel.not_charged: You won't be charged yet — review everything at checkout.

cart.title: Your trip
cart.note: Each experience keeps its own date, time and guests.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.sub_one: One order, {{count}} experience · Destination Paradise is your single host.
checkout.sub_few: One order, {{count}} experiences · Destination Paradise is your single host.
checkout.sub_many: One order, {{count}} experiences · Destination Paradise is your single host.
checkout.sub_other: One order, {{count}} experiences · Destination Paradise is your single host.
checkout.payment_note: You'll complete your payment on the secure page of our payment partner DPO Pay. In this preview the payment is simulated — no card details are entered on this site and nothing is charged.
checkout.recheck_note: Availability is re-checked before you pay.
checkout.conflict: Some departures are no longer available. Please adjust the highlighted trips.

errors.name_required: Please add the lead guest's name.
errors.email_invalid: That email address doesn't look right.

confirm.title: You're going to Paradise
confirm.lead: Order <ref>{{reference}}</ref> is confirmed. A confirmation is on its way to your email — each experience has its own booking code below.
confirm.missing_text: This confirmation link has expired in this browser. Your email confirmation has all the details.
